items.description: RELATED: Fantasy Coverage Daily picks, props | Rankings | Podcast

items.headline: Fantasy hockey picks props projections for 2025-26 season
items.description: NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth eager to learn from loss in Stanley Cup Playoff debut
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- The Utah Mammoth missed a massive opportunity Sunday. They lost to the Vegas Golden Knights 4-2 at T-Mobile Arena in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round after blowing a 2-1 third-period lead.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth Vegas Golden Knights game 1 recap April 19 2026
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Mark Stone and Nic Dowd scored 1:47 apart for the Vegas Golden Knights, who rallied in the third period for a 4-2 victory against the Utah Mammoth in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at T-Mobile Arena on Sunday.

items.headline: Boston Bruins learn hard way after squandering Game 1 lead against Sabres
items.description: BUFFALO -- The Boston Bruins learned the hard way that no lead is safe in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres epic Game 1 comeback long time coming
items.description: BUFFALO -- The roars started the second the Buffalo Sabres emerged from the tunnel, the fans standing, the pom-poms waving, the music thumping, the feeling electric. These were the lucky ones, inside the building. There were more, so many more, outside of KeyBank Center on the plaza, in a party

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Boston Bruins Buffalo Sabres game 1 recap April 19 2026
items.description: BUFFALO -- The Buffalo Sabres shocked the Boston Bruins by scoring three goals in a 4:34 span late in the third period en route to a 4-3 come-from-behind win in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round at KeyBank Center on Sunday.

items.headline: Color of Hockey Brett Peterson gearing up US as general manager for 2026 Worlds
items.description: William Douglas has been writing The Color of Hockey blog since 2012. Douglas joined NHL.com in 2019 and writes about people of color in the sport. Today, he profiles Florida Panthers assistant general manager Brett Peterson, who is general manager of the U.S. Men’s National Team for the 2026 IIHF

items.headline: Juraj Slafkovsky emerges as big time player in Canadiens' Game 1 win
items.description:
TAMPA -- The signs of Juraj Slafkovsky becoming a dominant power forward in the NHL have been there from the start.
The No. 1 pick by the Montreal Canadiens in the 2022 NHL Draft has always been able to combine his size (6-foot-3, 225 pounds) and his skill.
But this

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Tampa Bay Lightning Game 1 recap April 19 2026
items.description: TAMPA -- Juraj Slafkovsky scored his third power-play goal at 1:22 of overtime to give the Montreal Canadiens a 4-3 win against the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Benchmark International Arena on Sunday.​

items.headline: Kurt Russell Wyatt Buffalo Sabres 2026 playoffs
items.description:
While Buffalo Sabres fans may be waiting on a miracle, they already got the star of one.

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens fans cathedral watch party
items.description:
Hey, it was a Sunday after all.
Montreal Canadiens fans hosted a watch party at Cathedrale Saint-Jean-l'Evangeliste in Quebec to see their team take on the Tampa Bay Lightning in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round, and it could not have been more epic.
Fans filled the pews

items.headline: Scott Wedgewood rises to occasion in Game 1 for Avalanche in Western First Round
items.description:
DENVER -- Scott Wedgewood waited a few minutes to field his first question in the postgame press conference. It was fitting, considering the longtime backup goalie waited 10 NHL seasons before getting his first start in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
“Obviously, a long career to get to this point. Proud

items.headline: Jake Oettinger Filip Gustavsson goalie matchups Western first round
items.description: Goaltending is an integral part of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. To better understand the strengths and weaknesses of each goaltender, NHL.com charted 100 goals against each goaltender late in the regular season to see what patterns emerge.
